item.title: Approval queue
item.intent: High-stakes agent actions must queue for user approval before execution. No auto-send, no auto-buy, no auto-delete without explicit user consent.
item.description: SAFE AUTOMATION: Without approval queue, the agent can't safely propose actions that have real-world consequences. The email-digest skill must propose draft replies for approval — not auto-send. Telegram integration means the user gets notified on their phone, not just in a terminal. Resolution tracking means the agent knows what was approved vs. rejected, and can learn from the pattern. Acceptance: high-stakes actions queue for approval; Telegram notification sent; user can approve/reject from Telegram; resolution recorded in audit trail.
steps: Implement runtime approval queue for high-stakes actions
Add Telegram integration for approval notifications
Build approve/reject flow accessible from Telegram
acceptanceCriteria: High-stakes actions queue for approval before execution
Telegram notification sent for each pending approval
User can approve/reject directly from Telegram
